title: Sen. Warren calls on SEC to delay SpaceX IPO, flagging concerns about valuation and governance
summary_full: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.
summary_public: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.
